node.text: See the all new Samsung Galaxy Note9 unboxed in an epic all-day event! The new Note9 is Faster, Smarter and Better than ever before! Join our T-Mobile Gadget Guy @askdes as he takes on Rollercoasters, Seaplanes, Jet Skis and even Paragliding trying to exhaust the awesome new Note! The only question is - who will last longer!?
